compatibility_rules: required export names remain stable within stdlib major version 1
result tag numeric identity remains stable within stdlib major version 1
text/data helper meaning remains count-and-presence preserving within stdlib major version 1
helpers may grow additively, but exported families must not move between modules without updating the checked-in contracts

core_semantics.option_unwrap_or: returns value when presence flag is nonzero, otherwise fallback
core_semantics.string_view_length: returns the provided unit count unchanged
core_semantics.string_view_prefix_units: returns requested units clamped to the provided unit count and zero floor
core_semantics.byte_span_length: returns the provided byte count unchanged
core_semantics.byte_span_prefix_length: returns requested units clamped to the provided byte count and zero floor
core_semantics.array_count: returns the provided element count unchanged
core_semantics.array_prefix_count: returns requested elements clamped to the provided element count and zero floor
core_semantics.map_entry_value_or: returns value when presence flag is nonzero, otherwise fallback

error_semantics.result_is_ok: returns 1 only when tag equals result_ok_tag
error_semantics.result_unwrap_or: returns value only when tag equals result_ok_tag, otherwise fallback
error_semantics.result_error_or: returns code only when tag equals result_err_tag, otherwise fallback
error_semantics.ok_or_code: returns value when nonzero, otherwise fallback
error_semantics.or_throw_code: returns value when nonzero, otherwise fallback

keypath_semantics.component_count: returns root plus offset until runtime-backed keypath storage lands

non_goals: runtime-backed string or bytes storage in M306-B001
